subject: BM ownership and Page permissions for ad account transfer
description: Our ecommerce brand's ad account was created by an agency under their Meta Business Manager. We need the ad account and Pixel ownership moved under our own BM so finance can manage billing and we can control Page roles. Right now we only have advertiser access, cannot see 'Payment settings', and the agency won't add our business as owner.
blocker: Cannot transfer ownership or set up our company card on the ad account; launch is scheduled next week.
status: Active campaigns paused pending billing ownership

subject: TikTok Ads - payment method verification failed (PM-204)
description: We are a German entity running a self-serve TikTok Ads account targeting the UK. After spending ~£300, the account shows 'Payment method verification failed (code PM-204)' and charges are declined. We added a Revolut Business virtual card; billing address is Berlin while the card issuer shows London. The account is not linked to a Business Center yet.
blocker: Cannot resume campaigns due to payment verification failure.

subject: Google Ads suspension for 'Circumventing systems'
description: New account created under our agency MCC for a SaaS landing page (domain age 1 month). After the first Search campaign draft went live, the account was immediately suspended for 'Circumventing systems'. We used a residential proxy for a remote contractor during setup. One appeal was denied. Payment method is a corporate Visa; no previous Google Ads history.
